prompt: State the action, comparison condition, affected unit, and outcome.
review_question: What exactly changes, and compared with what?
title: Define the Intervention

prompt: List plausible confounders, mediators, colliders, and timing constraints.
review_question: Does the adjustment set support causal interpretation?
title: Review Adjustment

prompt: Compare effects across thresholds, assumptions, and cost/risk settings.
title: Sensitivity and Governance
